item.title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.

item.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

item.title: Cascade raises $3.5M to help construction firms find and win projects
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: a16z Speedrun, Ada Ventures, and Snowball VC have invested in Cascade's $3.5 million seed round.

item.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

item.title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

item.title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
item.description: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to help companies measure training effectiveness.

item.title: Bluecore Energy raises $10M to build portable nuclear reactors on barges
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Maritime nuclear energy startup Bluecore Energy has raised $10 million in a pre-seed funding round led by Slauson & Co.

item.title: Colossal Biosciences reportedly in talks to raise new capital at $20B–$30B valuation
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: The de-extinction startup is looking to double or triple its previous valuation, according to the report.

item.title: Natural raises $30M to reinvent payments for AI agents — and take on Stripe
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: The one-year-old startup aims to reinvent financial architecture for autonomous AI transactions.

item.title: Inference startup Infinity raises $15M from Touring Capital, OpenAI and Anthropic researchers
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: AI infrastructure company Infinity announced Monday a $15 million raise at a $100 million valuation from investors including Touring Capital, Principal VC, and researchers from companies such as OpenAI and Anthropic.

item.title: Watch Flock Safety CEO Garrett Langley discuss the future of surveillance at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Flock Safety sits right at the center of the debate over where the line should be drawn between privacy and public safety. That’s why we’re bringing Flock’s founder and CEO Garrett Langley to the stage to speak about those very issues.

item.title: StrictlyVC returns to New York City September 10 to celebrate a huge year for the city’s startup community
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: For the first time since 2024, StrictlyVC is coming back to New York City — and we're bringing the kind of access you’d expect from an under-wraps event to the whole startup, VC, and dealmaking community.

item.title: Applications close in 48 hours — here’s everything Australian founders need to know about Stripe x Startup Battlefield
item.dc:creator: Isabelle Johannessen
item.description: The window is almost shut. On August 19, eight startups will take the stage at Stripe Tour Sydney in front of investors, global press, and the Australian tech community. One startup walks away with automatic entry into TechCrunch Disrupt in San Francisco — no application, no further competition, a guaranteed spot on the world’s most […]

item.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open-weight AI models for coding.

item.title: Nuclear startup Valar Atomics in talks to raise new funding at $6B valuation
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: The potential deal highlights a growing trend of complex, multi-stage funding rounds that mask true entry prices.

item.title: No product? No problem. This Disrupt 2026 session shows how to get pre-seed funding with conviction, storytelling
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: It’s not just you: AI startups are taking in a huge amount of seed funding, and in the process making things harder for anyone looking for funding even at a pre-seed stage. We’ve covered the trend in detail, and at this year’s TechCrunch Disrupt event, we want to help pre-seed founders now being held to seed-stage […]

item.title: AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.

item.title: Sheryl Sandberg leads $10 million investment in AI-powered vehicle inspection service
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The startup, founded in 2021, lets enterprise customers use smartphones to scan and spot vehicle damage.

item.title: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
item.dc:creator: Kate Park
item.description: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.
